notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Austin Slater steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. Connor Norby out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielder's choice. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Ben Rice to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielder's choice. Aaron Judge scores. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Ben Rice to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández reaches on a throwing error by shortstop José Caballero. Jakob Marsee scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández reaches on a throwing error by shortstop José Caballero. Jakob Marsee scores. Otto Lopez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Yankees challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Max Fried picks off Heriberto Hernández at 1st on throw to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Owen Caissie pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Owen Caissie strikes out swinging, catcher Austin Wells to first baseman Ben Rice.
